news.title:
HDFC Bank's Chair Atanu Chakraborty resigned; Keki Mistry named interim Chair by RBI.
Belrise acquires UK-based Chester Hall; Nazara buys 50% stake in Bluetile Games for ₹918 crore.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank's Chair Atanu Chakraborty resigned; Keki Mistry named interim Chair by RBI.
Belrise acquires UK-based Chester Hall; Nazara buys 50% stake in Bluetile Games for ₹918 crore.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies plans to acquire Bluetile Games and Bestplay Systems for $100.3M, strengthening its casual gaming portfolio.
Acquisition integrates AI-driven gaming, scaling capabilities, and cross-promotion platform with performance-linked payouts contingent on CY27-29 targets.
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies plans to acquire Bluetile Games and Bestplay Systems for $100.3M, strengthening its casual gaming portfolio.
Acquisition integrates AI-driven gaming, scaling capabilities, and cross-promotion platform with performance-linked payouts contingent on CY27-29 targets.

news.title:
IndiGo CEO steps down; Reliance backs Texas refinery; Adani gains full stake in DP Jain TOT Toll Roads.
Nazara Tech sees ₹69.2Cr Morgan Stanley buy; Vedanta urges domestic resource use amid energy supply disruptions.
news.summary:
IndiGo CEO steps down; Reliance backs Texas refinery; Adani gains full stake in DP Jain TOT Toll Roads.
Nazara Tech sees ₹69.2Cr Morgan Stanley buy; Vedanta urges domestic resource use amid energy supply disruptions.

news.title: Nazara Technologies sees THINK INDIA OPPORTUNITIES MASTER FUND LP sell 2,885,000 shares at ₹239.8 avg price.
news.summary: Nazara Technologies sees THINK INDIA OPPORTUNITIES MASTER FUND LP sell 2,885,000 shares at ₹239.8 avg price.

news.title:
Nazara Tech's NSE block trade involved 2,885,000 shares at Rs 239.8.
The pre-open trade totaled Rs 69.2 crore, showcasing significant activity.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech's NSE block trade involved 2,885,000 shares at Rs 239.8.
The pre-open trade totaled Rs 69.2 crore, showcasing significant activity.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies announces investor/analyst meeting on Feb 17, 2026, in Mumbai.
The meeting will be a physical non-deal roadshow with one-on-one/group sessions.
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies announces investor/analyst meeting on Feb 17, 2026, in Mumbai.
The meeting will be a physical non-deal roadshow with one-on-one/group sessions.

news.title:
Nazara Tech's Curve Games secures 5-6 new titles, boosting growth through FY27-FY28.
WildWorks to launch hyper-casual game 'Go Slinky Go' by Q1 FY27, driving growth.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech's Curve Games secures 5-6 new titles, boosting growth through FY27-FY28.
WildWorks to launch hyper-casual game 'Go Slinky Go' by Q1 FY27, driving growth.

news.title:
Nazara Tech's Funky Monkey gaming plans 1-2 new centers monthly, targeting 100 centers in India.
Sustainable EBITDA margins are expected at 35-40% pre-IndAS or 25-35% post-IndAS.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech's Funky Monkey gaming plans 1-2 new centers monthly, targeting 100 centers in India.
Sustainable EBITDA margins are expected at 35-40% pre-IndAS or 25-35% post-IndAS.

news.title:
Nazara Tech expects margins to exceed 20% within 2-3 quarters, focusing on core IP-driven gaming.
Kiddopia projected to grow by FY27, with increased spending on user acquisition due to positive traction.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech expects margins to exceed 20% within 2-3 quarters, focusing on core IP-driven gaming.
Kiddopia projected to grow by FY27, with increased spending on user acquisition due to positive traction.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies reports 10% organic revenue growth, 25% profitability growth.
With ₹700 crore net cash, Nazara plans more acquisitions; capital raise undecided.
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies reports 10% organic revenue growth, 25% profitability growth.
With ₹700 crore net cash, Nazara plans more acquisitions; capital raise undecided.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies' board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M FY2025, alongside statutory auditors' review reports.
The board also approved INR 15 crore investment in Rusk Media and USD 500,000 in nCore Games via convertible instruments.
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies' board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M FY2025, alongside statutory auditors' review reports.
The board also approved INR 15 crore investment in Rusk Media and USD 500,000 in nCore Games via convertible instruments.

news.title:
Nazara Tech's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹677M from ₹558M QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 16.7% from 10.6% QoQ, showcasing strong performance.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹677M from ₹558M QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 16.7% from 10.6% QoQ, showcasing strong performance.

news.title:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.
news.summary:
JM Financial forecasts strong Q3FY26 for Paytm, Delhivery, Nykaa, and Eternal, with Buy ratings and target prices of Rs 1,810, Rs 570, Rs 325, and Rs 400, respectively.
Weaker performance expected for Swiggy and Nazara; Swiggy faces monetisation challenges, Nazara hit by seasonality and regulatory issues. Target prices: Rs 400, Rs 280.

news.title:
Promoter activity in Q2FY26 showed divergence; Nazara Tech led increases with 27.2%, while Clean Science and Oswal Pumps saw over 24% cuts.
Large caps like SBI, Bharti Airtel, and Apollo Hospitals saw promoter selling for fundraising. Poonawalla Fincorp and Adani Green showed promoter confidence.
news.summary:
Promoter activity in Q2FY26 showed divergence; Nazara Tech led increases with 27.2%, while Clean Science and Oswal Pumps saw over 24% cuts.
Large caps like SBI, Bharti Airtel, and Apollo Hospitals saw promoter selling for fundraising. Poonawalla Fincorp and Adani Green showed promoter confidence.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies faced a 27.2% stock drop after India's real money gaming ban, reporting a Rs. 34 crore Q2FY26 loss despite revenue growth of 64.9%.
The company is shifting focus to interactive entertainment, AI-driven development, and offline ventures targeting 20-25% growth, retaining key investors' confidence.
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies faced a 27.2% stock drop after India's real money gaming ban, reporting a Rs. 34 crore Q2FY26 loss despite revenue growth of 64.9%.
The company is shifting focus to interactive entertainment, AI-driven development, and offline ventures targeting 20-25% growth, retaining key investors' confidence.

news.title:
Nazara Tech targets 20-25% annual growth with EBITDA margins of 20-25%.
Kiddopia's subscriber growth is expected to turn positive by Q4.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech targets 20-25% annual growth with EBITDA margins of 20-25%.
Kiddopia's subscriber growth is expected to turn positive by Q4.

news.title:
Clairvest Group writes off its investment in Head Digital Works post real money gaming ban.
HDW operates A23 Rummy, impacted by blanket ban on skill-based gaming.
news.summary:
Clairvest Group writes off its investment in Head Digital Works post real money gaming ban.
HDW operates A23 Rummy, impacted by blanket ban on skill-based gaming.

news.title:
Nazara Tech Q2 FY26 profit surged to ₹885cr aided by Nodwin stake revaluation.
Revenue rose 65% YoY to ₹526.5cr; Moonshine Tech faced ₹915cr impairment under new gaming laws.
news.summary:
Nazara Tech Q2 FY26 profit surged to ₹885cr aided by Nodwin stake revaluation.
Revenue rose 65% YoY to ₹526.5cr; Moonshine Tech faced ₹915cr impairment under new gaming laws.

news.title:
Nazara Technologies Q2FY26 revenue ₹526 Cr (+65% YoY), EBITDA ₹62 Cr (+146% YoY).
Focus on global growth via IP portfolio, automation, AI, and new brand 'Enter. Magic.'
news.summary:
Nazara Technologies Q2FY26 revenue ₹526 Cr (+65% YoY), EBITDA ₹62 Cr (+146% YoY).
Focus on global growth via IP portfolio, automation, AI, and new brand 'Enter. Magic.'

news.title: Nazara Tech Q2 other income surged to 11.04B from 771M QoQ.
news.summary: Nazara Tech Q2 other income surged to 11.04B from 771M QoQ.
